subcodes.first_line: The Friend proclaimeth: The divine fire is ablaze, and the celestial Tree speaketh forth from the loftiest spot, yet none have ears to hear [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: دوست میفرماید نار الهیه مشتعل و سدره ربانیه در اعلی البقاع ناطق ولکن گوش نه
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @knowledge; recognition of God
